data.title: Austin Transit Partnership chooses Austin Rail Constructors to build Austin Light Rail system, first of its kind, Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on February 18, 2026, the Austin Transit Partnership has chosen Austin Rail Constructors (ARC) as the construction contractor for the city's initial light rail system. The selection of ARC signifies a significant progress in implementing Austin Light Rail.

data.title: Oskaloosa, Iowa will host the Junior League Softball Central Region Tournament for the first time from July 23-29, 2026.
data.description: Oskaloosa, Iowa is set to host the inaugural Junior League Softball Central Region Tournament from July 23 to 29, 2026. This marks the first time the event will be held in the city.

data.title: Spreadshop in Germany offers 48-hour fulfillment and premium printing for online merchants, a gamechanger in the industry.
data.description: In Leipzig, Germany, Spreadconnect and Spreadshop are revolutionizing the merchandise market, offering creators and businesses a risk-free entry with unmatched speed and quality. The print on demand integration solution, Spreadconnect, and the all-in-one merch shop solution, Spreadshop, boast an impressive production time ensuring that 95% of orders are prepared for shipping within 48 hours. This efficient process eliminates long delivery times and ensures top-tier finishing quality, addressing the crucial needs of sellers in today’s market.

data.title: Dell CFO to speak at investor conference on March 4 at Morgan Stanley event in San Francisco. Presentation at 2:35 p.m. PT / 5:35 p.m. ET. Live webcast available. About Dell Technologies.
data.description: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) has disclosed that their CFO, David Kennedy, is scheduled to participate in a fireside chat at the upcoming Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco, CA, on March 4, 2026, at 2:35 p.m. PT / 5:35 p.m. ET. Interested individuals can access a live webcast and replay of all conference webcasts on Dell Technologies’ Investor Relations page at investors.delltechnologies.com. Dell Technologies is a prominent company in the technology industry.

data.title: Trump organization trademarks "Donald J. Trump International Airport" as Florida plans to rename airport after president.
data.description: The Trump organization has deemed the action essential to safeguard their brand, with Florida gearing up to rename an airport after the president.

data.title: OSHA inspections decrease during first half of 2025, raising concerns about worker safety under current administration.
data.description: There is concern among labor advocates that under the Trump administration, oversight of companies is being reduced, raising fears of an increase in serious injuries and fatalities in the workplace. This shift in policy has raised alarm bells as workers face potential harm due to a lack of regulatory scrutiny. The potential for accidents and deaths has heightened with a decrease in oversight measures and an increase in leniency towards companies. This change in approach has sparked concerns about the safety and well-being of workers as they may be at greater risk of harm on the job. Labor advocates point to a significant decrease in regulatory enforcement, with fears that this could lead to a rise in workplace incidents resulting in injuries or even fatalities. The shift in policy has generated worries about the safety standards being compromised, leaving workers vulnerable to dangerous working conditions. With regulatory oversight being relaxed, there is a growing apprehension about the potential consequences for workers' safety, as the focus appears to be shifting away from ensuring a safe work environment.
MINISTER LEBLANC SAYS WHEN ASKED IF CANADA HAS DISCUSSED ANY CONTINGENCY PLAN WITH MEXICO IF U.S. SEEKS BILATERAL DEAL, LEBLANC SAID NO

data.title: Lumifi partners with Vizient to enhance cybersecurity for healthcare organizations, offering services to Vizient members.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Lumifi, a top cybersecurity solutions provider, has joined forces with Vizient, the largest healthcare performance improvement company in the United States. Through this partnership, Vizient member organizations now have the opportunity to utilize Lumifi’s complete range of cybersecurity services via Vizient’s established contracting procedure. This collaboration aims to streamline procurement processes and expedite security efforts for healthcare organizations encountering increasing cybersecurity challenges.

data.title: Crypto influencer Ran Neuner questions Bitcoin's store of value thesis after capital fled to gold during market stress; BTC fails its defining test after 12 years.
data.description: Popular crypto influencer Ran Neuner recently expressed concerns about Bitcoin's ability to function as a store of value. Neuner noted that during a recent period of market stress, capital moved towards gold rather than Bitcoin, raising questions about Bitcoin's long-held status as a reliable store of value. Bitcoin's transition from being seen as "peer-to-peer cash" to "digital gold," pursued by the community to gain ETF approval and institutional access, was expected to be validated during times of economic uncertainty. However, Neuner observed that when faced with tariffs, currency tensions, and fiscal instability, capital flowed towards gold instead of Bitcoin, despite institutions having unrestricted access to Bitcoin. This shift in the narrative is important as it signifies Bitcoin's departure from its original vision of being a cash alternative and highlights the challenges it faces in asserting itself as a store of value.

data.title: ROHM introduces new compact package for automotive MOSFETs in 4.9mm × 6.0mm size for main inverter control circuits.
data.description: ROHM Semiconductor has recently revealed the extension of its range of low-voltage (40V/60V) MOSFETs catered towards automotive purposes. This includes main inverter control circuits, electric pumps, and LED headlights. The latest products are incorporated with the new HPLF5060 package, sizing at 4.9mm × 6.0mm. This expansion aims to enhance offerings for automotive applications, boosting efficiency and performance within the industry.

data.title: BriaCell sells exclusive license for Soluble CD80 to its subsidiary BriaPro for cancer treatment.
data.description: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., along with its majority-owned subsidiary BriaPro Therapeutics Corp., have recently finalized a significant Purchase Agreement. Under this deal, BriaPro has agreed to acquire BriaCell’s exclusive license for the development and commercialization of Soluble CD80 (“sCD80”) as a biologic agent for treating cancer and other related assets. This agreement marks a significant development in the field of biotechnology, particularly in cancer care. The companies are based in Philadelphia and Vancouver, British Columbia, respectively. The transaction involves key securities, including Nasdaq (BCTX, BCTXW, BCTXZ, BCTXL) and TSX (BCT). The agreement is anticipated to have a meaningful impact on the biotechnology sector, with potential implications for cancer treatments.

data.title: Walmart stock pulls back post 23% rally before Q4 results. Market cap hits $1 trillion. New CEO mentioned.
data.description: Walmart's stock experienced a decline following a 23% surge prior to its Q4 earnings report scheduled for Thursday. The retail giant, listed on the Dow Jones, reached a market capitalization surpassing $1 trillion in recent weeks. Besides achieving record highs, the company has appointed a new CEO. The upcoming earnings report will be closely watched by investors and analysts.

data.title: Phenylketonuria market to soar by 2034 with innovative therapies & rising diagnosis rates fueled by potential treatments.
data.description: Between 2025 and 2034, the phenylketonuria treatment landscape is projected to undergo significant changes with various potential therapies such as Sepiapterin from PTC Therapeutics, NGGT002 from NGGT, JNT-517 from Jnana Therapeutics, and Pegvaliase from BioMarin being investigated. This transformation period is anticipated to bring about advancements in treating phenylketonuria with the introduction of new therapies in the market.

data.title: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. reports Q4 net loss of $219.2M & full year loss of $489.1M, distributable loss $101.7M & $269.0M.
data.description: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: CMTG) announced its financial results for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. The Company disclosed a GAAP net loss of $219.2 million and $489.1 million, translating to $1.56 per share and $3.49 per share, for the quarter and year respectively. The Distributable Loss, a non-GAAP financial metric, totaled $101.7 million and $269.0 million, or $0.71 per share and $1.88 per share for the same time frames.
CANADIAN MINISTER LEBLANC SAYS I AM REASSURED BY THE MEXICAN ECONOMY SECRETARY HIS DESIRE TO WORK WITH CANADA AND TO ENSURE THAT THE REVIEW OF USMCA RESULTS IN A TRILATERAL TRADE ARRANGEMENT

data.title: Atlassian names James Chuong as CFO, effective March 30, 2026. He brings 20+ years of finance experience.
data.description: Atlassian Corporation (NASDAQ: TEAM) based in San Francisco has appointed James Chuong as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO), starting from March 30, 2026. In this role, James will be responsible for managing Atlassian’s Finance and Legal departments. With over 20 years of finance leadership experience in technology and investment banking, James Chuong comes with a wealth of knowledge. Prior to joining Atlassian, he served as the CFO at another company.

data.title: Nutrien increases quarterly dividend to US$0.55 per share, announces new share repurchase program.
data.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, Nutrien Ltd. (TSX and NYSE: NTR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of US$0.55 per share. This dividend will be disbursed on April 16, 2026, to shareholders recorded on March 31, 2026. The current dividend marks a modest increase of about one percent from the previous dividend declared on November 5, 2025. Annually, this amounts to a dividend of US$2.20 per share. Additionally, the Board sanctioned the buyback of up to five percent of Nutrien's outstanding shares.

data.title: CRH's 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K for fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 filed with SEC, available online.
data.description: In New York, the Company has released its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, which has been officially filed with the SEC. This report can be accessed on the SEC's website (www.sec.gov) and the Company's website (www.crh.com). Additionally, it has been submitted to the U.K. National Storage Mechanism for review, with availability soon through https://data.
